result.reason: Users need a way to easily migrate their mRemoteNG settings to a new computer, which requires export and import functionality for application settings.
result.approach: Implement export/import functionality for application settings, likely serializing/deserializing settings from files handled by Settings.cs, SettingsLoader.cs, and SettingsSaver.cs. This will involve adding new UI elements to trigger these operations.
